mapper.sql: select b.id, b.language, b.name, b.author, b.description, b.total_price, b.words_price, b.chapter_price, b.free_chapters, b.cover, b.status, b.online_status, b.is_baoyue, b.is_hot, b.is_new, b.is_limited_free, b.is_greatest, b.is_god, b.total_words, b.total_chapters, b.total_views, b.total_favors, b.score, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, c.name as category_name from t_book_info b left join t_book_category bc on b.id = bc.book_id left join t_category c on bc.category_id = c.id
mapper.select: select b.id, b.language, b.name, b.author, b.description, b.total_price, b.words_price, b.chapter_price, b.free_chapters, b.cover, b.status, b.online_status, b.is_baoyue, b.is_hot, b.is_new, b.is_limited_free, b.is_greatest, b.is_god, b.total_words, b.total_chapters, b.total_views, b.total_favors, b.score, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, group_concat(c.name separator ',') as category_name from t_book_info b left join t_book_category bc on b.id = bc.book_id left join t_category c on bc.category_id = c.id where b.id = #{id} and b.deleted_at is null group by b.id
where b.name = #{name} and b.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_book_info
language, name, author, description, total_price, words_price, chapter_price, free_chapters, cover, status, online_status, is_baoyue, is_hot, is_new, is_limited_free, is_greatest, is_god, total_words, total_chapters, total_views, total_favors, score, create_by, remark, created_at, updated_at, create_time
#{language}, #{name}, #{author}, #{description}, #{totalPrice}, #{wordsPrice}, #{chapterPrice}, #{freeChapters}, #{cover}, #{status}, #{onlineStatus}, #{isBaoyue}, #{isHot}, #{isNew}, #{isLimitedFree}, #{isGreatest}, #{isGod}, #{totalWords}, #{totalChapters}, #{totalViews}, #{totalFavors}, #{score}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, unix_timestamp(now()), unix_timestamp(now()), sysdate()
mapper.update:
update t_book_info
language = #{language}, name = #{name}, author = #{author}, description = #{description}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, words_price = #{wordsPrice}, chapter_price = #{chapterPrice}, free_chapters = #{freeChapters}, cover = #{cover}, status = #{status}, online_status = #{onlineStatus}, is_baoyue = #{isBaoyue}, is_hot = #{isHot}, is_new = #{isNew}, is_limited_free = #{isLimitedFree}, is_greatest = #{isGreatest}, is_god = #{isGod}, total_words = #{totalWords}, total_chapters = #{totalChapters}, total_views = #{totalViews}, total_favors = #{totalFavors}, score = #{score}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = unix_timestamp(now()), update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update t_book_info set deleted_at = unix_timestamp(now()) where id = #{id}

update t_book_info set deleted_at = unix_timestamp(now()) where id in
#{id}
